title: Mama and Papa already standing together reading the note
prompt: Mid-close-up at the @beach-blanket on the dry golden sand. @Mama already CENTER-LEFT standing on the dry sand with both feet planted, sun hat on, holding the glowing @magic-bottle gently in her right hand at chest height, head tilted softly toward Papa to read along. Mama has exactly two arms and two hands visible. @Papa already CENTER-RIGHT standing on the dry sand with both feet planted right beside Mama, holding the unrolled @rescue-note open between his two hands at chest height between them, both adults reading the words silently. Papa has exactly two arms and two hands visible. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Both adults read the note in soft silence. Mama and Papa share a quiet warm look of bewildered curious concern. (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Mama (soft warm thoughtful voice): "A magic-forest fox stuck on an island... we need a plan." Papa (warm thoughtful nod, quiet dad-voice): "...we sure do." Both adults stay standing together gently on the dry sand. Calm cheerful kid-show family ambiance throughout — no shouting, no scary intensity, no environmental shake. Preserve each character's silhouette and proportions throughout — no morphing of facial features, no shifting of hair or wardrobe, no color drift on clothing or skin tone. Keep all character bodies stable, consistent in scale, and locked to the same outfit and hairstyle from second 0 through the final second. STRICT ANATOMY: Mama has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — right hand on the bottle, left hand at her side. Papa has exactly two arms and two hands at all times, both holding the note. Both adults stay grounded with both feet on the dry sand throughout — no leaping, no jumping. The sand stays plain clean golden sand — no marks, no red, no debris.
